# Ludovico — @octopusinc_ video digest (LLM index)

> AI-readable digest of 1860 @octopusinc_ videos and 4922 tools/products. Generated 2026-06-25. Base URL: https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/

## How to use this
- Find a tool/product by capability: scan **Videos** below (each line = the video's products + a summary of what it covers), or fetch https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/tools.txt / https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/tools.json (every tool, its canonical link, and the videos covering it).
- Full detail on a video: fetch https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/videos/<id>.html or its transcript https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/videos/<id>.avt.
- Whole corpus inlined (large; prefer the indexes above): https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/llms-full.txt.
- Every link here is absolute and directly fetchable.
